creator: erdgeist@erdgeist.org
text:
On Sun, 28 Apr 2013, Stefan Walter wrote:

> there hasn't been an update on this PR (see [1]) for quite a while, and
> sysutils/ezjail has been updated in the meantime. Please let me know what
> the current state of things is and if the issue described in the PR has
> been resolved.

I fixed the bug immediately but forgot to reply to the pr, sorry.

https://erdgeist.org/cvsweb/ezjail/ezjail-admin.diff?r1=1.289&r2=1.290&f=h
https://erdgeist.org/cvsweb/ezjail/ezjail-admin?rev=1.290&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup

Thanks for the report, Fahad.

   erdgeist
